tasks.subject: Task 1: Install Playwright and add credentials to .env
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Playwright is installed in the `doodoo/` project and credentials are available via environment variables so the scraper can read them at runtime.

**Files:**
- Modify: `doodoo/package.json`
- Modify: `doodoo/.env`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `npx playwright --version` runs without error from `doodoo/`
- [ ] Chromium browser binary is installed
- [ ] `doodoo/.env` contains all four credential keys
- [ ] Credentials are never hardcoded in TypeScript source files

**Verify:** From `doodoo/`: `npx playwright --version` → prints a version string like `Version 1.x.x`

```json:metadata
{"files":["doodoo/package.json","doodoo/.env"],"verifyCommand":"cd doodoo && npx playwright --version","acceptanceCriteria":["npx playwright --version runs without error","Chromium binary is installed",".env contains FI_EMAIL, FI_PASSWORD, DOODOO_ADMIN_EMAIL, DOODOO_ADMIN_PASSWORD","No credentials in TypeScript source"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: DB migration — fi_sessions, fi_order_pairs, fi_item_comparisons
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Three new PostgreSQL tables exist that can store Fashion Index comparison sessions, per-order pairs, and per-item results.

**Files:**
- Create: `doodoo/migrations/004-fi-tables.sql`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Running the SQL against the database succeeds without errors
- [ ] `fi_sessions`, `fi_order_pairs`, `fi_item_comparisons` tables exist
- [ ] Foreign key constraints are in place between the three tables

**Verify:** `psql $DATABASE_URL -c "\dt fi_*"` → lists three tables

```json:metadata
{"files":["doodoo/migrations/004-fi-tables.sql"],"verifyCommand":"psql $DATABASE_URL -c '\\dt fi_*'","acceptanceCriteria":["fi_sessions table exists","fi_order_pairs table exists with FK to fi_sessions","fi_item_comparisons table exists with FK to fi_order_pairs"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Shared types — fi.types.ts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A single types file defines every interface used by the FI module so later tasks can import from one place without circular dependencies.

**Files:**
- Create: `doodoo/src/fashion-index/fi.types.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] File compiles without TypeScript errors
- [ ] FiScrapedItem, FiOrderRow, DoodooOrderItem, FiItemStatus, FiPairStatus, FiItemComparison, FiOrderPairResult, FiComparisonResult, FiJobStatus, FiJob are all exported

**Verify:** `cd doodoo && npx tsc --noEmit` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files":["doodoo/src/fashion-index/fi.types.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd doodoo && npx tsc --noEmit","acceptanceCriteria":["All interfaces compile without errors","All required types are exported"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: PDF parser — fi-pdf-parser.ts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A pure function that takes a PDF buffer and returns the doodoo520 order ID extracted from the `Content:#XXXXXX` pattern, or `null` if not found.

**Files:**
- Create: `doodoo/src/fashion-index/fi-pdf-parser.ts`
- Test: `doodoo/src/fashion-index/fi-pdf-parser.spec.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Returns the numeric string after `Content:#` when present
- [ ] Returns null when pattern is absent
- [ ] Works with whitespace between `Content:` and `#`
- [ ] All 4 unit tests pass

**Verify:** `cd doodoo && npm test -- --testPathPattern=fi-pdf-parser` → all tests PASS

```json:metadata
{"files":["doodoo/src/fashion-index/fi-pdf-parser.ts","doodoo/src/fashion-index/fi-pdf-parser.spec.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd doodoo && npm test -- --testPathPattern=fi-pdf-parser","acceptanceCriteria":["Returns order ID string when Content:#XXXXXX present","Returns null when pattern absent","Handles whitespace variant","All 4 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Comparison logic — fi-comparison.service.ts
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A pure service that takes FI items and doodoo items and returns FiItemComparison[] with each item's status.

**Files:**
- Create: `doodoo/src/fashion-index/fi-comparison.service.ts`
- Test: `doodoo/src/fashion-index/fi-comparison.service.spec.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] matched: same code, same qty
- [ ] qty_mismatch: same code, different qty
- [ ] fi_only: code in FI but not doodoo
- [ ] doodoo_only: code in doodoo but not FI
- [ ] All 5 unit tests pass

**Verify:** `cd doodoo && npm test -- --testPathPattern=fi-comparison` → all tests PASS

```json:metadata
{"files":["doodoo/src/fashion-index/fi-comparison.service.ts","doodoo/src/fashion-index/fi-comparison.service.spec.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd doodoo && npm test -- --testPathPattern=fi-comparison","acceptanceCriteria":["matched status for equal code+qty","qty_mismatch for same code different qty","fi_only for FI-only items","doodoo_only for doodoo-only items","All 5 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Playwright scraper — Fashion Index session
tasks.description:
**Goal:** FashionIndexScraper.scrapeOrderRows(fiOrderId) logs into Fashion Index, searches, iterates all result rows, scrapes items, and downloads each PDF buffer.

**Files:**
- Create: `doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.scraper.ts`
- Test: `doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.scraper.spec.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Returns FiOrderRow[] — one entry per result row
- [ ] Each row has items[] with productCode, productName, qty, price
- [ ] Each row has a pdfBuffer (may be empty Buffer if no PDF found)
- [ ] Throws 'Fashion Index login failed' when login fails
- [ ] Unit tests pass

**Verify:** `cd doodoo && npm test -- --testPathPattern=fashion-index.scraper` → all tests PASS

```json:metadata
{"files":["doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.scraper.ts","doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.scraper.spec.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd doodoo && npm test -- --testPathPattern=fashion-index.scraper","acceptanceCriteria":["Returns FiOrderRow[] with items and pdfBuffer","Throws Fashion Index login failed on auth failure","All unit tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Playwright scraper — Doodoo520 admin session
tasks.description:
**Goal:** FashionIndexScraper.scrapeDoodooOrder(doodooOrderId) opens a separate browser context, logs into doodoo520.com/admin, navigates orders, and returns DoodooOrderItem[].

**Files:**
- Modify: `doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.scraper.ts`
- Modify: `doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.scraper.spec.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Returns DoodooOrderItem[] with productCode, productName, qty, price
- [ ] Returns empty array (not throws) when order not found
- [ ] Throws 'Doodoo520 login failed' when login fails
- [ ] All tests pass

**Verify:** `cd doodoo && npm test -- --testPathPattern=fashion-index.scraper` → all tests PASS

```json:metadata
{"files":["doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.scraper.ts","doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.scraper.spec.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd doodoo && npm test -- --testPathPattern=fashion-index.scraper","acceptanceCriteria":["Returns DoodooOrderItem[] on success","Returns empty array when order not found","Throws Doodoo520 login failed on auth failure","All tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: FashionIndexService — orchestration + job tracking + DB persistence
tasks.description:
**Goal:** FashionIndexService runs the full pipeline as a background job, tracked by an in-memory Map. Persists results to DB on completion.

**Files:**
- Create: `doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.service.ts`
- Test: `doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.service.spec.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] startJob returns UUID immediately without blocking
- [ ] getJob returns running status with progress messages
- [ ] On success: status 'done' with FiComparisonResult
- [ ] On error: status 'error' with error message
- [ ] Empty PDF buffer → pairStatus 'unlinked' (not a throw)
- [ ] Results persisted to fi_sessions, fi_order_pairs, fi_item_comparisons
- [ ] All 4 unit tests pass

**Verify:** `cd doodoo && npm test -- --testPathPattern=fashion-index.service` → all tests PASS

```json:metadata
{"files":["doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.service.ts","doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.service.spec.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd doodoo && npm test -- --testPathPattern=fashion-index.service","acceptanceCriteria":["startJob returns UUID immediately","Job reaches done with result on success","Job reaches error on scraper failure","Unlinked rows handled without throwing","All 4 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: FashionIndexController + FashionIndexModule + AppModule wiring
tasks.description:
**Goal:** FashionIndexController exposes POST /compare, GET /jobs/:id, GET /history. FashionIndexModule bundles all providers. AppModule imports it.

**Files:**
- Create: `doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.controller.ts`
- Test: `doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.controller.spec.ts`
- Create: `doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.module.ts`
- Modify: `doodoo/src/app.module.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] POST /api/fashion-index/compare returns { jobId } HTTP 201
- [ ] GET /api/fashion-index/jobs/:id returns job when found
- [ ] GET /api/fashion-index/jobs/nonexistent returns HTTP 404
- [ ] GET /api/fashion-index/history returns array
- [ ] All endpoints return 401 without JWT
- [ ] All 4 controller tests pass

**Verify:** `cd doodoo && npm test -- --testPathPattern=fashion-index.controller` → all tests PASS

```json:metadata
{"files":["doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.controller.ts","doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.controller.spec.ts","doodoo/src/fashion-index/fashion-index.module.ts","doodoo/src/app.module.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd doodoo && npm test -- --testPathPattern=fashion-index.controller","acceptanceCriteria":["POST /compare returns jobId","GET /jobs/:id returns job when found","GET /jobs/nonexistent returns 404","GET /history returns array","All 4 tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: Angular FiService
tasks.description:
**Goal:** FiService in Angular encapsulates startComparison and pollJob so the component only subscribes to observables.

**Files:**
- Create: `doodoo-fam/src/app/pages/invoice/comparison/fi.service.ts`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] startComparison(orderIds) returns Observable<{ jobId: string }>
- [ ] pollJob(jobId) polls every 3 seconds and completes when status is done or error
- [ ] Uses withCredentials: true on all requests
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors

**Verify:** `cd doodoo-fam && npx tsc --noEmit` → no errors

```json:metadata
{"files":["doodoo-fam/src/app/pages/invoice/comparison/fi.service.ts"],"verifyCommand":"cd doodoo-fam && npx tsc --noEmit","acceptanceCriteria":["startComparison returns Observable<{jobId}>","pollJob polls every 3s and completes on done/error","withCredentials: true on all requests","TypeScript compiles without errors"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: Frontend — mode switcher + FI input view
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The comparison page gains a mode tab bar and a Fashion Index input view with textarea, start button, progress indicator, and error banner.

**Files:**
- Modify: `doodoo-fam/src/app/pages/invoice/comparison/comparison.ts`
- Modify: `doodoo-fam/src/app/pages/invoice/comparison/comparison.html`
- Modify: `doodoo-fam/src/app/pages/invoice/comparison/comparison.scss`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Two tabs: PDF Upload and Fashion Index
- [ ] Tab switching preserves state in each mode
- [ ] Textarea accepts FI order IDs (newline or comma separated)
- [ ] Start button disabled when textarea empty or job running
- [ ] Progress message shown while running
- [ ] Error banner shown on error
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors

**Verify:** `cd doodoo-fam && npx tsc --noEmit` → no errors; manually verify tabs switch correctly in browser

```json:metadata
{"files":["doodoo-fam/src/app/pages/invoice/comparison/comparison.ts","doodoo-fam/src/app/pages/invoice/comparison/comparison.html","doodoo-fam/src/app/pages/invoice/comparison/comparison.scss"],"verifyCommand":"cd doodoo-fam && npx tsc --noEmit","acceptanceCriteria":["PDF Upload and Fashion Index tabs render","Tab switching works","Textarea accepts IDs","Button disabled when empty or running","Progress message shown while running","Error banner shown on error"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 12: Frontend — FI results view
tasks.description:
**Goal:** When a FI job completes, results are displayed grouped by doodoo520 order ID with per-item status badges and warning banners for unlinked/not-found rows.

**Files:**
- Modify: `doodoo-fam/src/app/pages/invoice/comparison/comparison.ts`
- Modify: `doodoo-fam/src/app/pages/invoice/comparison/comparison.html`
- Modify: `doodoo-fam/src/app/pages/invoice/comparison/comparison.scss`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Results grouped by doodooOrderId in cards
- [ ] Each row shows code, name, FI qty, doodoo qty, status badge
- [ ] matched=green, qty_mismatch=red, fi_only/doodoo_only=amber badges
- [ ] unlinked and doodoo_not_found pairs show amber warning banners
- [ ] Summary shows matched / mismatched counts
- [ ] Start new comparison button resets state
- [ ] Sample result visible via loadSampleFiResult()
- [ ] TypeScript compiles without errors

**Verify:** `cd doodoo-fam && npx tsc --noEmit` → no errors; click View sample on the Fashion Index tab and verify all cards/badges/banners render correctly

```json:metadata
{"files":["doodoo-fam/src/app/pages/invoice/comparison/comparison.ts","doodoo-fam/src/app/pages/invoice/comparison/comparison.html","doodoo-fam/src/app/pages/invoice/comparison/comparison.scss"],"verifyCommand":"cd doodoo-fam && npx tsc --noEmit","acceptanceCriteria":["Results grouped in cards by doodooOrderId","Status badges correct colours","Unlinked/not-found show amber banners","Summary counts correct","Sample result renders without errors"]}
```
